name: 05-subprocess
description: exec:subprocess capability with cmd (basename only per ADR-0005) and argCount qualifiers. Component is a pypi-hosted MCP server, exercising non-npm ecosystem in the purl.
notes: ADR-0005 requires cmd to carry basename only — 'git', not '/usr/bin/git' or 'git status'. The full argv is recorded in the sandbox evidence record, not in the capability. Qualifier keys in JCS-canonical order: argCount before cmd (lex). Policy #7 (no-exec-or-subprocess-without-capability) evaluates 'allow' here because observed matches declared.
